AI-Powered Real Estate

The Future of California
Real Estate is Here.

PRADO agents operate with proprietary AI compliance technology that eliminates errors, predicts market shifts, and matches buyers to homes with unprecedented accuracy.

◈
AI Compliance Engine

Powered by LionHeart — our proprietary platform that audits every C.A.R. form, tracks deadlines, and ensures 100% compliance with California's post-NAR settlement requirements. Zero errors. Zero risk.

LionHeart Powered
◇
Predictive Market Intelligence

Machine learning models analyze hyperlocal data — inventory velocity, rate sentiment, migration patterns — to forecast pricing 90 days out. Our agents don't react to the market. They anticipate it.

Live Data
△
Smart Property Matching

AI-driven buyer profiling goes beyond bedrooms and bathrooms. We match lifestyle preferences, commute patterns, school quality, and investment potential — delivering the right home, faster.

Neural Matching
Rooted in Corona • Serving All of California
Who We Are

Built by Agents.
For Everyone.

PRADO Realty Group is a family-oriented, agent-owned California brokerage with a combined seventy years of leadership experience. We specialize in probates, short sales, foreclosures, commercial sales, and leasing.

◈
Direct Broker Access — Always. Cell phone access to both brokers. No gatekeepers.
◈
DRE #02262809 — Licensed, compliant, and deeply experienced in California real estate law.
◈
119 N Maple Street, Suite M, Corona CA 92878 — 24/7 office, green screen studio, conference room.
What We Do

Comprehensive California
Real Estate Services

01
Buyer Representation

Full post-NAR compliance. From first showing to closed escrow, we handle negotiations and inspections with AI-backed precision.

02
Luxury Listings

Strategic pricing, cinematic marketing, and targeted reach. Maximum velocity and value in any California market condition.

03
Probate & Complex Sales

Specialized expertise in probate, short sales, foreclosures, and REO. The most complex California transactions, handled with confidence.

04
Commercial & Leasing

Investment analysis, cap rate evaluation, and landlord/tenant representation at the highest level across all of California.

05
Relocation Services

Seamless California transitions for individuals, families, and corporate relocations. Every detail handled.

06
AI Transaction Coordination

Full-service TC powered by LionHeart AI. C.A.R. form accuracy, deadline tracking, and disclosure management — fully automated.
